description: Phase parent for collapsing the 10 .md /doctor:* command surface (shipped in 013) into 3 .md (router + /doctor:update orchestrator + /doctor:mcp infra) via a manifest-driven argv-positional routing pattern. Phase 1 (001-router-phase) ships the router additively alongside the existing 10 commands so both invocation forms work during validation. Phase 2 (002-cutover-phase, planned) deletes the 9 old commands across 4 runtime dirs, sed-updates 23 manual playbook scenarios and 4 harness scripts, and rebuilds the Skill Advisor index. Locked decision: hard cutover end state (no shim aliases); Option C boundary (orchestrator stays separate).
